title: agrostis infirma
intro: Agrostis infirma, also known as weak bent or fragile bent, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agrostis infirma are said to include the reduction of fever, relief from coughs and colds, and the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Agrostis infirma is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
